api_key.description: ConvertKit v3 API secret, sent as the api_secret query parameter on every request. Never logged.

access_token.description: Alternate secret name for the same api_secret credential (legacy fallback: api_key takes precedence when both are set).

api_secret.description: Alternate secret name for the same credential (legacy fallback, lowest precedence: api_key, then access_token, then api_secret).

base_url.description: ConvertKit API base URL override for tests or proxies.

mode.description: Runtime mode: live (default) or fixture for credential-free conformance.
